evals.name: update-all-outdated
evals.prompt: Are any of the tools in ~/.dot/tools.py out of date? Update the ones that are.
evals.expected_output: Lists every tool's current vs latest via `gh api`, shows a diff table, confirms before editing, edits tools.py for each outdated entry, runs `uv run update_shas.py` to refresh hashes, shows git diff.

evals.name: bump-single-tool
evals.prompt: Bump fd to the latest version.
evals.expected_output: Queries `gh api repos/sharkdp/fd/releases/latest`, strips the `v` prefix, edits the fd version in tools.py, runs `uv run update_shas.py`, shows the diff.

evals.name: check-only
evals.prompt: What's the newest version of ripgrep available upstream, compared to what we have pinned?
evals.expected_output: Queries `gh api repos/BurntSushi/ripgrep/releases/latest`, reports current vs latest. Does NOT edit tools.py, does NOT run update_shas.py.
